parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ credential_name: $json.credential_name, from: $json.from_email, to: $json.test_email, subject: $json.subject + ' (seq1)', html: '

Test email seq1 — reply detection threading test.

', messageId: $json.msgId1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ credential_name: $json.credential_name, from: $json.from_email, to: $json.test_email, subject: 'Re: ' + $json.subject + ' (seq2)', html: '

Test email seq2 — threaded reply.

', messageId: $json.msgId2, inReplyTo: $json.seq1_messageId, references: $json.seq1_messageId }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ credential_name: $json.smtp_credential_name, from: $json.from_email, to: $json.test_email, subject: $json.subject, html: '

This is an E2E reply detection test. Please reply to this email to test reply detection.

Marker: ' + $json.marker + '

', messageId: $json.msgId }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const prev = $input.item.json;
return { json: { ...prev, tier0_test: { tested: false, reason: prev.found ? 'no in-reply-to header' : 'reply not found' } } };
